component.name: warden-mcp
component.summary: Vaultwarden/Bitwarden MCP server for AI agents

description.p: warden-mcp is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that lets AI agents interact with Vaultwarden or Bitwarden password vaults via the official Bitwarden CLI. MCP clients can search, create, update, move, and read vault items without reimplementing Bitwarden client-side cryptography.
The server operates in HTTP/SSE mode (default, port 3005) for networked agents, or in stdio mode for direct integration with desktop MCP hosts such as Claude Code or Cursor.
